policy_notes: Historical backfill (Feb 2023). Neutral defaults applied; seasonal calendar and MSP from CACP records.

Cold storage period (Dec-Mar). HP/Kashmir cold-stored apple supply to Coimbatore. 50% BCD on imported apples keeps foreign competition minimal. GST on fresh fruit: 0%. Price stability typical during cold storage release. No local Coimbatore production or TN government scheme for apple.
Banana harvest season. PMFBY insurance active for Coimbatore district. TNIAMP sucker subsidy ₹26,250/ha supports production. APEDA Cluster Development Programme - TN banana in export cluster.

Main harvest season for beans (French/cluster) in Coimbatore uplands (Nov-Mar). Supply peak → price dip. No central MSP. NHM off-season incentive ₹2,500/ha. Polyhouse subsidy 50% (up to 4000 sqm) encourages year-round protected cultivation. Uzhavar Santhai reduces middlemen commissions. PMKSY-PDMC micro-irrigation: 100% subsidy (SF/MF) supports cost reduction.

Rabi beetroot harvest season (Dec-Mar) in TN hills and Coimbatore belt. Peak supply → downward price pressure. NHM off-season vegetable incentive ₹2,500/ha to encourage planting. Uzhavar Santhai direct marketing scheme reduces middleman margin. No central MSP for beetroot; price set by market forces. Input subsidy: 100% micro-irrigation subsidy for small/marginal farmers (PMKSY-PDMC).
Maize MSP ₹1962/quintal acts as price floor (CACP/CCEA). PM-KISAN income support active for eligible farmers. NFSM seed/demo support.

state_scheme_name: NHM-MIDH Mango High Density Planting Subsidy
policy_notes: Mango main harvest season (Mar-Jun, TN). No central MSP; price driven by market. NHM HDP subsidy ₹9,840/ha to improve yield. PMFBY crop insurance covers mango losses due to natural calamity. Export promotion: select varieties (Imam Pasand, Bangalora) to EU/Gulf via APEDA.

Pre-arrival season (HP/Kashmir apple harvest Aug-Nov). Cold storage stock depleting → prices typically 20-40% higher in Coimbatore market. Import duty 50% BCD protects domestic supply from cheap imports. No local TN production policy applicable.
Banana harvest season. PMFBY insurance active for Coimbatore district. TNIAMP sucker subsidy ₹26,250/ha supports production. APEDA Cluster Development Programme - TN banana in export cluster.

Transition/growing phase for beans. NHM vegetable cultivation incentive ₹2,500/ha. PMKSY micro-irrigation 100% subsidy (small/marginal) reduces input cost. Shade-net and polyhouse construction subsidy (50%) for protected cultivation.

Off-season for beetroot in Coimbatore; limited supply. Price typically 1.5-2x harvest season levels. NHM off-season incentive ₹2,500/ha encourages summer cultivation. Uzhavar Santhai price transparency scheme active.
Maize MSP ₹1962/quintal acts as price floor (CACP/CCEA). PM-KISAN income support active for eligible farmers. NFSM seed/demo support.

Banana harvest season. PMFBY insurance active for Coimbatore district. TNIAMP sucker subsidy ₹26,250/ha supports production. APEDA Cluster Development Programme - TN banana in export cluster.

Off-season beans in Coimbatore; lower supply from local farms. Price typically elevated (40-70% above peak season). NHM polyhouse subsidy 50% enables protected cultivation to extend supply. Shade-net subsidy 50% up to 4000 sqm for off-season vegetable farming.

Off-season for beetroot in Coimbatore; limited supply. Price typically 1.5-2x harvest season levels. NHM off-season incentive ₹2,500/ha encourages summer cultivation. Uzhavar Santhai price transparency scheme active.
Maize MSP ₹1962/quintal acts as price floor (CACP/CCEA). PM-KISAN income support active for eligible farmers. NFSM seed/demo support.

Off-peak banana period. Planting/growing phase. TNIAMP subsidy for banana suckers ₹26,250/ha ongoing. PMFBY insurance enrollment window for kharif season.

Off-peak banana period. Planting/growing phase. TNIAMP subsidy for banana suckers ₹26,250/ha ongoing. TN Special Banana Scheme 2024-25 - planting material distribution ongoing. PMFBY insurance enrollment window for kharif season.

Main harvest season for beans (French/cluster) in Coimbatore uplands (Nov-Mar). Supply peak → price dip. No central MSP. NHM off-season incentive ₹2,500/ha. Polyhouse subsidy 50% (up to 4000 sqm) encourages year-round protected cultivation. Uzhavar Santhai reduces middlemen commissions. PMKSY-PDMC micro-irrigation: 100% subsidy (SF/MF) supports cost reduction.

Rabi beetroot harvest season (Dec-Mar) in TN hills and Coimbatore belt. Peak supply → downward price pressure. NHM off-season vegetable incentive ₹2,500/ha to encourage planting. Uzhavar Santhai direct marketing scheme reduces middleman margin. No central MSP for beetroot; price set by market forces. Input subsidy: 100% micro-irrigation subsidy for small/marginal farmers (PMKSY-PDMC).
Maize MSP ₹2225/quintal acts as price floor (CACP/CCEA). PM-KISAN income support active for eligible farmers. NFSM seed/demo support.

policy_notes: PRICE CRASH EVENT: Mango prices fell below ₹500/quintal (₹5/kg) in TN markets. Statewide farmer protest Jun 10, 2025 in Krishnagiri, Dharmapuri, Salem, Namakkal districts. Centre approved compensation for Karnataka; TN awaiting approval.
